blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
